sources.name: City of Saskatoon Open Data
sources.notes: Index source first. Snapshot only datasets with licence and reuse reviewed. Track current, retired, missing, and replaced datasets, especially across the 2024 platform transition.

sources.name: City of Saskatoon Archives
sources.notes: Preserve finding-aid references, collection names, date ranges, and research notes. Do not copy restricted holdings.

sources.name: City of Saskatoon Heritage Register
sources.notes: Track version, access date, and revision status. Heritage records can feed place and landmark records.

sources.name: City of Saskatoon History Timeline
sources.notes: Use as timeline index and source reference. Avoid copying long passages.

sources.name: Saskatoon Transit GTFS and Realtime Feeds
sources.notes: Good first realtime/hourly proof lane. Source includes trip updates, service alerts, vehicle positions, and GTFS downloads. Confirm endpoint terms before storing snapshots.

sources.name: Right To Food Food Security Now Riding Profiles
sources.notes: Baseline structural-conditions source. Use address lookup only transiently to resolve public geography. Store riding/profile metadata, source references, and mixed-granularity warnings, not private addresses or copied reports.

sources.name: Saskatoon Police Service News Releases
sources.notes: Sensitive source. Store releases as claims and metadata. Public display defaults to review_required or aggregate_only.

sources.name: Saskatoon Fire Department Releases
sources.notes: Sensitive source. Generalize locations where needed.

sources.name: Local Media Index
sources.notes: Store metadata, claims, and links. Do not copy full articles.
